description: Before re-deriving any past-work, decision, or fact that might already exist in the wiki, wiki.py search (or L1_index read) was run and its results shown in the transcript.
When retrieving existing wiki facts, the order followed search -> timeline -> fetch, with no more than 3 fetches before following the link graph or giving up.
Facts cited from the wiki include page paths or IDs (wiki/<page>.md format) so a reader can verify the source.
Any new wiki write ran overlap/dedup checks and write-gate (either explicitly via skill invocation or described in detail) BEFORE creating or updating a page.
